specific_location: Aspen Village Road several houses before the Wildcat Loop
description: Small finches with dark faces, short stubby bills, dark rufous caps, at least one with pink breast.Behaviors: Three were perched in the branches of a single deciduous tree for several minutes. Other similar birds were flitting about with similar calls but were obscured by trees and on private property.Call: rising call similar to AMGO, other high notesPlumage: At least 1 adult male, other two unknown
